title: Policy Update Field Allowlist
description: The update_policy handler (api/v1/policies.py:258-260) uses setattr for all fields from the Pydantic payload without restricting which fields are updatable. Add an explicit _UPDATABLE_FIELDS allowlist, consistent with the pattern used in IdentityService.update_agent (services/identity.py:227-234). This is a defense-in-depth measure to prevent accidental privilege escalation if the schema is modified.
validation: Policy update uses an explicit _UPDATABLE_FIELDS allowlist
Only intended fields can be modified via the update endpoint
Attempts to set non-updatable fields are silently ignored or return error
Tests verify non-updatable fields are rejected
